title: Lecture 1 – Introduction
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Introduction to algorithm design and the stable matching problem.

title: Lecture 2 – Stable Matching
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Gale-Shapley algorithm, correctness proofs, and properties of stable matchings.

title: Lecture 2B – Stable Matching Extended
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Extended topics in stable matching including multiple stable matchings.

title: Lecture 3 – Greedy Algorithms
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Greedy paradigm, interval scheduling, Huffman coding, exchange arguments.

title: Lectures 4–5 – Divide and Conquer
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Divide and conquer paradigm, recurrences, Master Theorem, merge sort, closest pair.

title: Lecture 6 – Dynamic Programming
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Dynamic programming fundamentals, 0/1 knapsack, LCS, optimal substructure.

title: Lecture 7 – Advanced DP
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Advanced dynamic programming: edit distance, sequence alignment, further examples.

title: Lecture 9 – Advanced Topics
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Advanced algorithm analysis and complexity topics.

title: Complete Lecture Notes
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Complete consolidated lecture notes for the DAA course.

title: Practice Problems
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Practice problems with solutions for exam preparation.

title: DAA Main Reference
author: Dr. László Szabó
description: Main DAA course reference material covering all four algorithm families.
